title: Welcome to Patriots For Action
excerpt: What this PAC hub is, what it is not, and how to stay connected.
author: Patriots For Action
bodyMarkdown:
We built this site to keep supporters informed and equipped.

### What you’ll find here

- Events you can attend
- Updates you can share
- Ways to volunteer or donate

### What you won’t find here

County microsites are hosted on the Texas hub at **PatriotsInActionTX.com**. This PAC site intentionally stays focused on statewide updates and action.

If a post is syndicated from another site in the future, we’ll link to the original source instead of scraping or copying content.

title: How to submit an event
excerpt: Events are temporarily paused on this PAC site. Here’s how to share local activity in the meantime.
author: Patriots For Action
bodyMarkdown:
Events pages are temporarily paused on this PAC site.

### In the meantime

- Share what’s happening by joining the community and posting the details there.
- For county-level involvement, use the Texas hub site.
- If you need to reach the statewide team, use the Contact page.

### What to include

- Title and start time
- Location or virtual link
- A short summary
- Registration link (if any)

We may edit for clarity and consistency before publishing.
